name: shopping-list-monorepo
description: A full-stack shopping list application with Next.js frontend and GraphQL backend

scripts.dev: concurrently "yarn workspace shopping-list-client run dev" "yarn workspace shopping-list-server run dev"
scripts.build: yarn workspace shopping-list-client run build && yarn workspace shopping-list-server run build
scripts.lint: yarn workspace shopping-list-client run lint && yarn workspace shopping-list-server run lint
scripts.lint:fix: yarn workspace shopping-list-client run lint:fix && yarn workspace shopping-list-server run lint:fix
scripts.format: yarn workspace shopping-list-client run format && yarn workspace shopping-list-server run format
scripts.clean: rimraf apps/*/node_modules apps/*/.next apps/*/dist && rimraf node_modules

author: kenmckaba
